name: Ngn2 Induced Neuron Differentiation from Human ES/iPS Cells
nameCn: Ngn2 诱导人 ES/iPS 细胞神经元分化方案

usage.en: Doxycycline-inducible Ngn2 overexpression protocol for rapid generation of glutamatergic neurons from human ES or iPS cells, with glia co-culture for maturation.
usage.zh: 多西环素诱导 Ngn2 过表达方案，从人 ES 或 iPS 细胞快速生成谷氨酸能神经元，配合胶质细胞共培养促进成熟。

materials.name: Neuronal growth medium: Neurobasal-A + 1× Glutamax + 1× B27 + 5% FBS

components.name: Day -1: Coat matrigel ≥1 h. Split ES/iPS with accutase (1 mL/well 6-well, check at 3 min). Collect, spin 1000 rpm 5 min, count. Plate 30–45k cells/mL in mTeSR + Thiazovivin. Infect with lentivirus (TetO-Ngn2-Puro + Ubi-rtTA).

note.en: Cell density depends on cell line fragility. For H1: 0.5–1M per 24-well plate.
note.zh: 密度取决于细胞系脆弱程度。H1: 0.5–1M/24 孔板。

components.name: Day 0: Switch to N2 medium + BDNF (10 ng/mL) + NT3 (10 ng/mL) + Laminin (0.2 µg/mL) + Doxycycline (2 µg/mL).
Day 1: Add Puromycin (1 µg/mL) to N2 medium with BDNF/NT3/Laminin/Dox.
Day 3: Add glia (1 confluent T75 glia for 2–3 × 24-well plates) in B27 medium + BDNF/NT3/Laminin/Dox + Ara-C (2 µM).
Day 4–7: Change half B27 medium (with BDNF/NT3/Laminin/Dox/Ara-C) every 2–3 days.
Day 7–10: Change half medium with neuronal growth medium + Ara-C (± Dox).
Day 10–21: Add neuronal growth medium to 1 mL, change 1/3 medium weekly.
After Day 21: Change ≥75% medium at least once per week for maintenance.

detailedSteps.zh: **第 −1 天 — 接种与慢病毒感染**

detailedSteps.en: Coat plates with Matrigel (1:50 dilution in cold DMEM/F12) for ≥1 h at 37°C or overnight at 4°C.
detailedSteps.zh: Matrigel（1:50 冷 DMEM/F12 稀释）包被培养板，37°C ≥1 h 或 4°C 过夜。

detailedSteps.en: Dissociate ES/iPS cells with Accutase (1 mL per 6-well, check at 3 min). Collect cells, spin 1000 rpm 5 min, count. Plate at 30–45k cells/mL in mTeSR + 2 µM Thiazovivin.
detailedSteps.zh: Accutase 消化 ES/iPS 细胞（每 6 孔 1 mL，3 min 检查）。收集细胞，1000 rpm 离心 5 min，计数。mTeSR + 2 µM Thiazovivin 接种 30–45k/mL。

detailedSteps.en: Add concentrated lentivirus (TetO-Ngn2-Puro + Ubi-rtTA) to cells. ~0.3 µL concentrated virus per well of 24-well plate. Incubate overnight.
detailedSteps.zh: 向细胞中加入浓缩慢病毒（TetO-Ngn2-Puro + Ubi-rtTA）。24 孔板每孔约 0.3 µL 浓缩病毒。过夜孵育。

detailedSteps.en: Replace medium with N2 medium (DMEM/F12 + 1× N2 + 1× NEAA) supplemented with BDNF (10 ng/mL), NT3 (10 ng/mL), Laminin (0.2 µg/mL), and Doxycycline (2 µg/mL).
detailedSteps.zh: 换为 N2 培养基（DMEM/F12 + 1× N2 + 1× NEAA），添加 BDNF（10 ng/mL）、NT3（10 ng/mL）、Laminin（0.2 µg/mL）和多西环素（2 µg/mL）。
**第 1 天 — 嘌呤霉素筛选**

detailedSteps.en: Add Puromycin (1 µg/mL) to N2 medium with BDNF/NT3/Laminin/Dox. Non-transduced cells die within 24–48 h.
detailedSteps.zh: N2 培养基（含 BDNF/NT3/Laminin/Dox）中加入嘌呤霉素（1 µg/mL）。未转导细胞在 24–48 h 内死亡。
**第 3 天 — 加入胶质细胞共培养**

detailedSteps.en: Dissociate primary mouse glia (p0 or p1) with trypsin. Add glia (~1 confluent T75 per 2–3 × 24-well plates) in B27 medium (Neurobasal-A + Glutamax + B27) + BDNF/NT3/Laminin/Dox + Ara-C (2 µM).
detailedSteps.zh: 胰蛋白酶消化小鼠原代胶质细胞（p0 或 p1）。B27 培养基（Neurobasal-A + Glutamax + B27）+ BDNF/NT3/Laminin/Dox + Ara-C（2 µM），加入胶质细胞（约 1 个 T75 汇合的量对应 2–3 块 24 孔板）。
**第 4–7 天 — B27 培养基维持**

detailedSteps.en: Change half the B27 medium (with BDNF/NT3/Laminin/Dox/Ara-C) every 2–3 days. Neurons begin extending processes.
detailedSteps.zh: 每 2–3 天换半量 B27 培养基（含 BDNF/NT3/Laminin/Dox/Ara-C）。神经元开始伸出突起。
**第 7–10 天 — 换为神经元生长培养基**

detailedSteps.en: Change half medium with neuronal growth medium (Neurobasal-A + Glutamax + B27 + 5% FBS) + Ara-C. Doxycycline optional after Day 7.
detailedSteps.zh: 换半量为神经元生长培养基（Neurobasal-A + Glutamax + B27 + 5% FBS）+ Ara-C。第 7 天后多西环素可选。

detailedSteps.en: Add neuronal growth medium to 1 mL per well. Change 1/3 medium weekly. Neurons develop synaptic connections and electrophysiological activity by Day 14–21.
detailedSteps.zh: 每孔补至 1 mL 神经元生长培养基。每周换 1/3 培养基。神经元在第 14–21 天发育突触连接和电生理活性。

detailedSteps.en: Change ≥75% medium at least once per week. Neurons can be maintained for months with proper feeding. Perform downstream assays (electrophysiology, IF, calcium imaging).
detailedSteps.zh: 每周至少换 ≥75% 培养基。适当喂养可维持数月。进行下游实验（电生理、IF、钙成像）。

briefSteps.en: Day −1: Plate iPSC + lentivirus → Day 0: N2 + Dox/BDNF/NT3 → Day 1: Add Puro → Day 3: Add glia + B27 + Ara-C → Day 4–7: Half-change B27 q2–3d → Day 7–10: Switch to growth medium → Day 10–21: 1/3 change weekly → Day 21+: Maintain
briefSteps.zh: 第 −1 天：接种 iPSC + 慢病毒 → 第 0 天：N2 + Dox/BDNF/NT3 → 第 1 天：加 Puro → 第 3 天：加胶质 + B27 + Ara-C → 第 4–7 天：B27 半换 q2–3d → 第 7–10 天：换生长培养基 → 第 10–21 天：每周换 1/3 → 第 21 天后：维持

note.en: After lentiviral infection overnight, cells are committed; switch medium on Day 0 as scheduled
note.zh: 慢病毒过夜感染后细胞已定型；按计划在第 0 天换液

note.en: After glia addition on Day 3, the culture system is established — continue with scheduled feeds
note.zh: 第 3 天加入胶质细胞后培养体系建立——按计划继续喂养

note.en: Mature neurons (Day 14–21+) can be maintained long-term; cells cannot be frozen and re-plated at this stage
note.zh: 成熟神经元（第 14–21+ 天）可长期维持；此阶段不能冻存后重新接种

notes.en: N2 medium: DMEM/F12 + 1× N2 supplement + 1× NEAA. B27 medium: Neurobasal-A + 1× Glutamax + 1× B27. Neuronal growth medium: Neurobasal-A + 1× Glutamax + 1× B27 + 5% FBS. Glia can be p0 or p1, dissociated with trypsin. Virus volume may need optimization per batch (~0.3 µL concentrated virus per well of 24-well).
notes.zh: N2 培养基：DMEM/F12 + 1× N2 + 1× NEAA。B27 培养基：Neurobasal-A + 1× Glutamax + 1× B27。神经元生长液：Neurobasal-A + 1× Glutamax + 1× B27 + 5% FBS。胶质细胞用 p0 或 p1，胰蛋白酶消化。病毒用量需按批次优化。
